steps.t: Baillindiel is at the Elf-harbour of Celondim, in Ered Luin. Baillindiel is waiting for you to return with the first set of components.
Baillindiel is at the Elf-harbour of Celondim, in Ered Luin. Baillindiel is waiting for you to return with the second set of components.
Baillindiel is at the Elf-harbour of Celondim, in Ered Luin. Baillindiel is waiting for you to return with the last set of components.
